homepage.valueProp: At OC Healthy Smiles, your oral health and comfort is our highest priority — our friendly, dedicated Costa Mesa, CA, dentists offer innovative treatment options using advanced technology, with over 8,000 healthy smiles treated since 2005.

about.headline: Meet 5-Star Rated Costa Mesa, CA, Dentist, Dr. Mark Nguyen of OC Healthy Smiles
about.introParagraph: As a top-rated Costa Mesa, CA, dentist, dentistry is Dr. Nguyen's passion. A native of Orange County, CA, Dr. Mark K. Nguyen earned his Doctorate of Dental Surgery at the world-renowned New York University College of Dentistry and is licensed to practice in both California and Nevada. After a general practice residency at the Loma Linda VA Hospital, Invisalign certification, and a clinical concentration program in cosmetic dentistry, Dr. Nguyen is uniquely qualified to create beautiful, healthy smiles. Dr. Mark Nguyen has been voted Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County for two consecutive years by board-certified California dentists. As a way of giving back to the community, Dr. Nguyen provides a Dentistry From the Heart Day, in which free dentistry is donated to those in the community who lack access to dental care.
about.philosophy: My team and I believe that all individuals should have the ability to preserve the health and wellness of their smile for a lifetime of improved function, comfort, and aesthetics. Our philosophy of giving back extends beyond our practice walls — from our annual Smiles for Veterans events to our Dentistry From the Heart Day, we are committed to serving the Orange County community.
about.closingCTA: Ready to schedule? | Book an Appointment

invisalign.headline: Top Provider of Invisalign in Orange County, CA
invisalign.subheadline: OC Healthy Smiles is a recognized Invisalign Platinum Provider — certified since 2004 and awarded Platinum Provider status for 2018, 2019, and 2020.
invisalign.intro: At our all-in-one dental practice, we are thrilled to be the top provider of Invisalign among dentists in Orange County, CA. Our Invisalign-certified dental office offers Invisalign to patients who want a clear, comfortable way to straighten their teeth without brackets or wires. Invisalign straightens your teeth in much the same way braces would, except its state-of-the-art technology means you won't have any brackets semi-permanently glued to your teeth. Invisalign uses removable, virtually invisible aligners custom-fitted to your smile. Our dentists have over 15 years of experience with Invisalign and have been awarded the title of Platinum Invisalign Providers for 2018, 2019, and 2020. We also offer Propel technology, which can accelerate your Invisalign treatment by up to 50% — allowing you to switch aligners weekly rather than bi-weekly. All new patients receive free custom whitening trays. We are open Monday through Wednesday from 7AM to 7PM to fit your busy schedule.
differentiatorsWoven: Invisalign Platinum Provider in Orange County — Recognized as Platinum Provider for 2018, 2019, and 2020.
Propel technology to accelerate Invisalign treatment 50% faster
Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County two consecutive years
Free custom whitening trays for all new patients
Extended hours Monday–Wednesday 7AM to 7PM

teeth-whitening.headline: Teeth Whitening
teeth-whitening.subheadline: Our cosmetic dentists in Costa Mesa, CA, can improve your smile with professional teeth whitening.
teeth-whitening.intro: A bright set of teeth can give you a great reason to smile a little wider. If you wish your teeth were a bit whiter for an upcoming event such as a wedding, graduation, or job interview, or if you simply want to restore your smile's natural brilliance, teeth whitening with our Costa Mesa cosmetic dentists can help. Professional whitening can remove years of stains caused by certain habits (like smoking) and the consumption of acidic foods and beverages such as wine and coffee. As a new patient at OC Healthy Smiles, you'll also receive free custom whitening trays to help maintain your results at home. Dr. Mark Nguyen has been voted Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County for two consecutive years, and our extended hours — Monday through Wednesday from 7AM to 7PM — make it easy to fit your appointment into your schedule.
differentiatorsWoven: Free custom whitening trays for all new patients
Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County two consecutive years
Extended hours Monday–Wednesday 7AM to 7PM

porcelain-veneers.headline: Dental Veneers
porcelain-veneers.subheadline: Our 5-star-rated cosmetic dentists in Costa Mesa, CA, offer porcelain veneers as one of our advanced dentistry options.
porcelain-veneers.intro: If you are not comfortable with the shape, length, or overall look of your teeth, then dental veneers may be a great option for your smile. Porcelain veneers are thin layers that cover your existing teeth to improve their appearance. Our 5-star-rated cosmetic dentists in Costa Mesa, CA, are able to offer porcelain veneers as one of our advanced dentistry options — you can feel confident knowing that your perfect smile is only a few visits away. Dr. Mark Nguyen has been voted Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County for two consecutive years by board-certified California dentists. Our cosmetic gallery includes cases such as 8 minimal prep veneers that transformed a patient's smile just in time for her wedding, and four porcelain veneers that corrected small, gapped teeth into a dream smile. As part of our all-in-one practice, open since 2005, new patients also receive free custom whitening trays to complement their veneer results.
differentiatorsWoven: Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County two consecutive years
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Free custom whitening trays for all new patients

root-canal.headline: Root Canal
root-canal.subheadline: Our in-house endodontist provides pain-free root canal treatment in Costa Mesa, CA.
root-canal.intro: Unfortunately, the term 'root canal' has a terrible reputation, but you can feel assured that your root canal at OC Healthy Smiles will be pain-free. A root canal is a procedure used to salvage a tooth that has been severely damaged by decay or infection, removing the damaged tissue and sealing the tooth to prevent further harm. At OC Healthy Smiles, we are proud to have Dr. Joelle Tavitian — an endodontist with specialty training from the University of Southern California — available in-house. Dr. Tavitian received her dental degree from USC in 1999 and completed two additional years of endodontic specialty training, and she also volunteers her skills abroad providing free dental care for orphaned children and underserved communities. Emergency appointments are available, and our extended hours Monday through Wednesday from 7AM to 7PM mean you can get relief when you need it most.
differentiatorsWoven: Endodontist with USC specialty training and volunteer work abroad
Emergency appointments available
Extended hours Monday–Wednesday 7AM to 7PM

teeth-cleaning.headline: 5-Star-Rated Dentists for Dental Cleanings in Costa Mesa, CA
teeth-cleaning.subheadline: Professional dental cleanings at OC Healthy Smiles help protect the long-term health of your teeth and gums.
teeth-cleaning.intro: At OC Healthy Smiles, our mission is to provide quality dental cleanings in Costa Mesa, CA. Brushing and flossing your teeth are key to maintaining a healthy smile, but they aren't the only steps you should take to improve the strength and longevity of your teeth and gums. Tartar is a hardened deposit on your tooth that results from a buildup of plaque along the gums — these hardened deposits, if not routinely removed, can cause cavities, tooth decay, and gum disease. Professional cleanings remove tartar that at-home brushing cannot. All new patients receive free custom whitening trays as part of their first visit. We use the latest digital x-ray technology instead of film x-rays for safer, clearer imaging. We are also a Premiere Provider with Delta Dental and are in-network with Aetna PPO and Guardian PPO — and we provide a complimentary dental insurance benefits check before your visit so you know exactly what to expect.
differentiatorsWoven: Free custom whitening trays for all new patients
Digital x-rays instead of film x-rays
Complimentary dental insurance benefits check for patients
Premiere Provider with Delta Dental, in-network Aetna and Guardian PPO

dental-bridges.headline: Dental Bridges
dental-bridges.subheadline: Our Costa Mesa dentists can restore your smile with a custom dental bridge when a tooth cannot be saved.
dental-bridges.intro: If you have a missing tooth or need to have a tooth pulled, our Costa Mesa dentists may be able to replace that tooth with a dental bridge. A dental bridge is used when a tooth can't be salvaged with other restorative options and a stable solution is needed to fill the gap, restore your bite, and prevent neighboring teeth from shifting. At OC Healthy Smiles — an all-in-one dental practice serving Orange County since 2005 — we offer bridges as part of a full spectrum of tooth-replacement options. For patients whose cases benefit from it, we are also one of the few offices in Orange County to have invested in CT scan guided implant surgery technology, allowing our team to plan restorations with exceptional precision. Flexible payment options are available. To learn more about dental bridges and how they may be able to restore your smile, call us at 714.422.0596 or schedule an appointment online.
differentiatorsWoven: CT scan guided implant surgery technology
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Flexible payment options available

dental-implants.headline: Dental Implants
dental-implants.subheadline: Our dentists in Costa Mesa, CA, can improve the overall look and function of your teeth with dental implants.
dental-implants.intro: At OC Healthy Smiles, our mission is to provide quality dental implants in Costa Mesa, CA. If some or all of your teeth are no longer salvageable or are missing altogether, dental implants offer a permanent, natural-feeling solution. Dental implants are comfortable and feel much like your normal teeth — fixed in place with an artificial root that your gum tissue and jaw will accept as your own. As Dr. Mark Nguyen has noted: "At OC Healthy Smiles, we offer a technique called CT scan guided implant surgery. We are one of the few offices in Orange County that has invested in this technology to safely and effectively perform implant surgery." Our all-in-one practice has been serving Orange County since 2005, and Dr. Austin Burnett — our in-house oral surgeon — holds active hospital privileges at Orange County Global Medical Center in Santa Ana. Flexible payment options are available to help make treatment accessible.
differentiatorsWoven: CT scan guided implant surgery technology
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Flexible payment options available
Active hospital privileges at Orange County Global Medical Center

oral-surgery.headline: Oral Surgery
oral-surgery.subheadline: Our Orange County dental staff includes an expertly trained oral surgeon, endodontist, and dental anesthesiologist.
oral-surgery.intro: Our Orange County, CA, dental staff includes an expertly trained oral surgeon, endodontist, and dental anesthesiologist. Whether you are seeking wisdom tooth extraction, a root canal, or dental implant surgery, our in-house specialists allow you to receive comprehensive surgical care without being referred out. Our oral surgeon, Dr. Austin Burnett, completed his Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery training at Cook County Hospital — a level one trauma center in Chicago — and was awarded the Resident of the Year award twice during his residency. Dr. Burnett currently serves as a Clinical Educator at the University of California, Los Angeles School of Dentistry (UCLA) and holds active hospital privileges at Orange County Global Medical Center in Santa Ana. He holds certifications in Advanced Cardiovascular Life Support (ACLS), Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS), Advanced Trauma Life Support (ATLS), and Basic Life Support (BLS). Emergency appointments are available.
differentiatorsWoven: Resident of the Year award won twice during residency
Clinical Educator at UCLA School of Dentistry
Active hospital privileges at Orange County Global Medical Center
Emergency appointments available

cavities-filling.headline: Cavities / Filling
cavities-filling.subheadline: OC Healthy Smiles offers prompt, comfortable cavity treatment and tooth-colored fillings in Costa Mesa, CA.
cavities-filling.intro: Sometimes cavities happen, even if you are careful to maintain good oral hygiene practices such as brushing, flossing, and visiting your family dentist for regular dental cleanings. When tooth decay strikes, it's important to treat it quickly and properly — if a cavity isn't addressed, it can lead to further decay affecting other teeth and the health of your gums as well. At OC Healthy Smiles, we use digital x-rays instead of film x-rays for more precise, lower-exposure imaging that helps us detect decay at its earliest stages. Our all-in-one practice has been caring for Orange County smiles since 2005, and emergency appointments are available when you need relief fast.
differentiatorsWoven: Digital x-rays instead of film x-rays
Emergency appointments available
All-in-one dental practice since 2005

dental-crowns.headline: Dental Crowns
dental-crowns.subheadline: Our dentists in Costa Mesa, CA, specialize in non-metallic Lava Crowns matched to the color of your natural teeth.
dental-crowns.intro: Dental crowns help to strengthen and retain teeth that are suffering from tooth decay, extensive cavities, or extreme wear and tear from teeth grinding and other causes. At OC Healthy Smiles, we specialize in non-metallic Lava Crowns, which are made of high-quality medical ceramics. Our non-metallic dental crowns can be matched to the color of your other teeth for a seamless, natural result — and because they contain no metal, they are a comfortable, aesthetically pleasing option for most patients. Emergency appointments are available for urgent crown needs, and flexible payment options are offered through our all-in-one practice, open since 2005.
differentiatorsWoven: Emergency appointments available
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Flexible payment options available

dental-sealants.headline: Dental Sealants
dental-sealants.subheadline: Our Costa Mesa dentists offer dental sealants to protect teeth from decay-causing bacteria.
dental-sealants.intro: Your molars (the teeth in the back of your mouth) have lots of ridges that are great for chewing. Unfortunately, these ridges can get worn down, and they can get deeper and narrower over time. When these spaces become too narrow, your toothbrush bristles can't reach all the way in to clean them properly, which means food and bacteria can get trapped and cause decay. Our OC Healthy Smiles dentists can provide you with a treatment called a dental sealant to help prevent food and bacteria from sneaking into those narrow spaces. Dental sealants are a thin protective coating applied directly to the chewing surfaces of the back teeth. Our all-in-one practice has been serving Orange County families since 2005, and we use digital x-rays instead of film x-rays to monitor your dental health with greater accuracy and less exposure.
differentiatorsWoven: All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Digital x-rays instead of film x-rays

dentures.headline: Dentures
dentures.subheadline: Our expert Costa Mesa dentists provide custom-fitted dentures as a comfortable tooth-replacement option.
dentures.intro: If you are missing too many teeth for a dental bridge but don't feel confident about proceeding with dental implants, then dentures may be a good choice for you. Dentures are a set of removable artificial teeth designed to restore the appearance and function of your smile. Our expert dentists in Costa Mesa, CA, and the OC Healthy Smiles team will take careful impressions to ensure that your new dentures fit comfortably and securely. We understand that cost can be a concern, which is why flexible payment options are available — and we provide a complimentary dental insurance benefits check before your visit. Our all-in-one practice has been helping Orange County patients find the right tooth-replacement solution since 2005.
differentiatorsWoven: Flexible payment options available
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Complimentary dental insurance benefits check for patients

fluoride-treatment.headline: Fluoride Treatment
fluoride-treatment.subheadline: OC Healthy Smiles provides in-office fluoride treatments in Costa Mesa, CA, to protect teeth of all ages.
fluoride-treatment.intro: Fluoride is a mineral that can help to prevent cavities by repairing damaged tooth enamel when the damage is still in its very early, microscopic stages. The benefits of fluoride have been known for decades and it remains one of the most effective preventive tools in dentistry. In-office fluoride treatment at our Costa Mesa dental office can help you and your loved ones protect the health and integrity of your teeth. The fluoride paste used at OC Healthy Smiles is a professional-grade formulation applied directly by our dental team for maximum benefit. Our all-in-one practice has been caring for Orange County families since 2005, and we use digital x-rays instead of film x-rays to track enamel health and catch early decay before it progresses.
differentiatorsWoven: All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Digital x-rays instead of film x-rays

gum-treatment.headline: Gum Treatment
gum-treatment.subheadline: Fight periodontal disease with our 5-star-rated dentists for painless gum therapy in Orange County, CA.
gum-treatment.intro: Gum therapy, also sometimes called Scaling and Root Planing (SRP), treats the gum tissue around your teeth when they become inflamed or infected. Our dentists provide painless gum therapy in Costa Mesa, CA — and our team includes Dr. Joelle Tavitian, an in-house endodontist with specialty training from the University of Southern California, bringing specialist-level expertise to the care of your periodontal health. Periodontal disease, also known as gum disease, is an infection that affects the tissue surrounding your teeth. When it isn't treated promptly, it can lead to tooth loss and broader systemic health consequences. Our all-in-one practice has been serving Orange County patients since 2005, and emergency appointments are available when gum concerns require prompt attention.
differentiatorsWoven: Endodontist with USC specialty training and volunteer work abroad
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Emergency appointments available

oral-cancer-screening.headline: Oral Cancer Screening
oral-cancer-screening.subheadline: Early detection is key — OC Healthy Smiles includes oral cancer screening as part of every comprehensive exam.
oral-cancer-screening.intro: Over 40,000 Americans are diagnosed with oral and throat cancers each year, and as with any type of cancer, the chance of recovery relies in part upon how early the cancer was first detected. As part of your comprehensive exam at OC Healthy Smiles, our team performs an oral cancer screening at no additional charge — because catching any abnormality early is one of the most important things we can do for your long-term health. Our 5-star-rated Costa Mesa dental office has been providing comprehensive care since 2005, and our extended hours — Monday through Wednesday from 7AM to 7PM — make it easy to prioritize your health without disrupting your workday. If you have any concerns between visits, do not hesitate to reach out.
differentiatorsWoven: All-in-one dental practice since 2005
5-star rated Costa Mesa dentist
Extended hours Monday–Wednesday 7AM to 7PM

tooth-extraction.headline: Tooth Extraction
tooth-extraction.subheadline: Our 5-star-rated Costa Mesa dental office provides gentle tooth extractions, including wisdom tooth removal.
tooth-extraction.intro: Wisdom teeth are the third molars that begin to appear in late adulthood. When these teeth are in their proper place, all is well. For many people, however, wisdom teeth can become painful when they begin to push against existing teeth or become impacted beneath the gumline. At OC Healthy Smiles, we never want you or your child to be in pain. We often recommend oral surgery for wisdom tooth extraction — both to alleviate the discomfort of impacted wisdom teeth and to protect the alignment of surrounding teeth. Beyond wisdom teeth, our in-house oral surgeon Dr. Austin Burnett handles a full range of extractions. Dr. Burnett was awarded the Resident of the Year award twice during his Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery residency at Cook County Hospital and holds active hospital privileges at Orange County Global Medical Center in Santa Ana. Emergency appointments are available, and our extended hours Monday through Wednesday from 7AM to 7PM mean you can get care when you need it.
differentiatorsWoven: Resident of the Year award won twice during residency
Active hospital privileges at Orange County Global Medical Center
Emergency appointments available
Extended hours Monday–Wednesday 7AM to 7PM

night-guards.headline: Night Guards
night-guards.subheadline: OC Healthy Smiles provides custom night guards in Costa Mesa, CA, to protect your teeth from grinding and clenching.
night-guards.intro: It may not be the prettiest thing to wear to bed, but dentists often recommend a night guard to protect teeth from grinding while you sleep. As Dr. Mark Nguyen — voted Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County for two consecutive years — notes: "Grinding and clenching of teeth is a huge concern with aging teeth." Left unaddressed, bruxism can lead to worn enamel, chipping, cracking, jaw discomfort, and costly restorative work. A custom-fitted night guard from OC Healthy Smiles is fabricated specifically for your bite, providing a comfortable and precise fit that over-the-counter options cannot replicate. Our all-in-one practice has been protecting Orange County smiles since 2005.
differentiatorsWoven: Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County two consecutive years
All-in-one dental practice since 2005

bonding.headline: Dental Bonding
bonding.subheadline: OC Healthy Smiles offers tooth-colored dental bonding to repair chips, cracks, and gaps in Costa Mesa, CA.
bonding.intro: Dental bonding is a conservative, cost-effective cosmetic treatment that uses a tooth-colored composite resin to repair chipped, cracked, or gapped teeth — often in a single visit. At OC Healthy Smiles, our cosmetic team is led by Dr. Mark Nguyen, who has been voted Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County for two consecutive years by board-certified California dentists. As part of our all-in-one practice, open since 2005, bonding is offered alongside a full range of cosmetic and restorative options so your care plan can be tailored to your goals and budget. New patients receive free custom whitening trays, which pair well with bonding to give you a brighter, more uniform smile.
differentiatorsWoven: Top Cosmetic Dentist in Orange County two consecutive years
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Free custom whitening trays for all new patients

gum-grafting.headline: Gum Grafting
gum-grafting.subheadline: OC Healthy Smiles provides gum grafting to address gum recession and protect tooth roots in Costa Mesa, CA.
gum-grafting.intro: Gum recession is a common concern, particularly as we age. As Dr. Mark Nguyen has noted, "When your gums recede, the roots of the teeth can be exposed" — and exposed roots not only look unappealing but can lead to increased sensitivity, tooth damage, and eventual tooth loss. Gum grafting is a procedure that restores receded gum tissue, protecting the roots of your teeth and improving the overall appearance of your smile. At OC Healthy Smiles, our in-house team includes Dr. Joelle Tavitian, an endodontist with specialty training from the University of Southern California, bringing specialist-level expertise to your periodontal care. Our all-in-one practice has been serving Orange County patients since 2005, and Dr. Austin Burnett holds active hospital privileges at Orange County Global Medical Center for cases requiring additional surgical support.
differentiatorsWoven: Endodontist with USC specialty training and volunteer work abroad
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Active hospital privileges at Orange County Global Medical Center

dental-bonding.subheadline: OC Healthy Smiles offers tooth-colored dental bonding to repair chips, cracks, and gaps in Costa Mesa, CA.

snore-guards-and-sleep-apnea-devices.headline: Snore Guards and Sleep Apnea Devices
snore-guards-and-sleep-apnea-devices.subheadline: Our Costa Mesa dental office takes a comprehensive approach to health — including treatment for sleep apnea and snoring.
snore-guards-and-sleep-apnea-devices.intro: In our Costa Mesa, CA, dentists' office, we believe strongly in taking a comprehensive approach to dentistry. After all, maintaining your good health involves a lot more than just your teeth. One major health concern that some people deal with is sleep apnea — and what many don't realize is that your Orange County, CA, dentist can play an important role in its diagnosis and treatment. Sleep apnea is a disorder marked by one or more pauses in breathing throughout the night, and it can have serious consequences for your overall health if left unaddressed. OC Healthy Smiles offers oral appliances, including snore guards and sleep apnea devices, as a comfortable alternative to CPAP therapy for appropriate candidates. Dr. Mark Nguyen has completed advanced training through the American Association of Dental Sleep Medicine — Advanced Dental Sleep Medicine. Our all-in-one practice has been serving Orange County since 2005, and extended hours Monday through Wednesday from 7AM to 7PM make it convenient to get the care you need.
differentiatorsWoven: Comprehensive approach to dentistry beyond teeth
American Association of Dental Sleep Medicine — Advanced Dental Sleep Medicine
All-in-one dental practice since 2005
Extended hours Monday–Wednesday 7AM to 7PM

faqs.question: What Are The Medical Advantages of Straight Teeth?
faqs.answer: Treating your smile with Invisalign prevents more serious and costly dental issues from arising. It is important to understand that Invisalign does more than just give you a more visually appealing smile. With properly aligned teeth, it will be harder for food particles to get trapped and less likely for you to have bad breath. You are less likely to develop gingivitis and periodontal (gum) disease after treatment. If you had metal braces in the past, you will notice that Invisalign promotes better oral hygiene compared to metal braces. There is no need to purchase special brushing or flossing tools because Invisalign aligners are removable.

faqs.question: How Often Will I Switch Invisalign Aligners?
faqs.answer: Your dentist will prescribe an amount of time that you will wear your aligners before switching to a new set. If you wear them daily, you will typically switch them out every two weeks. Your dentist may give you the option to accelerate your treatment time with Propel, which allows you to finish treatment 50% faster and switch your aligners out weekly rather than bi-weekly. Your dentist may have a different suggested time than the estimated times above, so if you are unsure how long to wear your aligners, make sure to give your dentist a call.

faqs.question: What are your office hours?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday through Wednesday from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM and Thursday from 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM. We are closed Friday through Sunday. You can call, text, or email us anytime — if you reach out outside of our regular business hours, we'll get back to you as soon as possible once we're back in the office.

faqs.question: Do you accept dental insurance?
faqs.answer: We work with most PPO dental insurances to maximize your dental benefits. We are a Premiere Provider with Delta Dental and are in-network with Aetna PPO and Guardian PPO. We will do a complimentary benefits check prior to your visit and inform you of any potential out-of-pocket costs. If you have further questions about your coverage, we strongly advise you to give your insurance company a call so they can explain your benefits in detail.

faqs.question: What should I expect at my first visit as a new patient?
faqs.answer: As a new patient at OC Healthy Smiles, you can expect a comprehensive exam, digital x-rays, and a complimentary dental insurance benefits check so you know your coverage before any treatment begins. All new patients also receive free custom whitening trays. Our team will take the time to educate you on your oral health and walk you through any recommended treatment in a consultative, pressure-free environment.

locations.headline: Serving Costa Mesa and Surrounding Orange County Communities
locations.intro: OC Healthy Smiles is located at 2900 Bristol St., Suite A205, Costa Mesa, CA 92626, and serves patients from Newport Beach, Newport Coast, Irvine, Fountain Valley, Corona del Mar, Huntington Beach, Tustin, Laguna Beach, and Santa Ana.

rationale: The editorial approach preserved the practice's own voice at every opportunity — verbatim prose from the original site was used for the about section, philosophy, and service descriptions, with light editing only to correct typos (e.g. 'OC Health Smiles') and integrate differentiators that were documented on the site but absent from individual service pages. For the three services with no source page (bonding, dental-bonding, gum-grafting) and the thin night-guards entry, new copy was written conservatively using only facts the practice documented — named awards, named credentials, named technology — without fabricating patient counts, philosophy statements, or claims not found in the crawl. The hero headline was created to anchor the practice by name, location, and rating since the original 'Healthy Smiles' H1 provided no differentiation, but every element of the new headline (5-star, Costa Mesa, OC Healthy Smiles) is drawn directly from the site's own language.
